description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a flared rim and a gently tapering body that widens at the shoulder before narrowing again towards the base. The upper section features a muted green band, while the main body is a warm reddish-brown, accented by a distinctive cream-colored, organic leaf or frond motif on one side. The base and rim are finished in a natural beige tone, giving the vase a harmonious, earthy palette. The surface appears matte with subtle textural variations, suggesting hand-crafted pottery. The interior is hollow, suitable for holding flowers or decorative arrangements, and the overall form is both functional and decorative, making it ideal for urban public or semi-public spaces.
description: A tall, flared ceramic vase with a green band, reddish-brown body, and cream leaf motif, finished with beige rim and base. The surface is matte and subtly textured, giving it an artisanal look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream-colored leaf or frond motif prominently against the reddish-brown body.
description_view_1: Side view with the plain reddish-brown body and green band, no visible motif.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain reddish-brown body and green band.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuation of the cream motif, curving around the reddish-brown body.
